# RENOVATIONSTEPS.COM

The ultimate tool for project planning and tracking. Complete control and management of all your renovation projects.

## Project Vision
RenovationSteps.com is designed to bridge the gap between complex construction management and accessible home improvement planning. It provides a highly visual, interactive interface for managing phases, tasks, costs, and teams.

## Key Modules
- **Phases & Tasks**: Organize the renovation workflow from demolition to final touches.
- **Budgeting**: Real-time cost tracking and financial planning.
- **Team Collaboration**: Manage workers and assign responsibilities.
- **Visual Kanban**: Drag-and-drop task management.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://renovationsteps.com/): Product overview and main call to action.
- [Platform Features](https://renovationsteps.com/features.html): Detailed technical breakdown of the planning tools.
- [Pricing](https://renovationsteps.com/pricing.html): Tiered plans for individuals and enterprise clients.
- [Contact](https://renovationsteps.com/contact.html): Direct line for support and custom inquiries.

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: HTML5, Tailwind CSS, Three.js (WebGL Shaders), Lucide Icons.
- i18n: Multi-language support (EN, SR, RU, ZH).
- Backend: Node.js, Express, Prisma, PostgreSQL.
